title: My Little Pony Paintings (G5)
body:
## About

**My Little Pony Paintings (G5) is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces in-game paintings with characters from My Little Pony: A New Generation**

## Changes
- Replaced 46 paintings!
- Added characters: Sunny Starscout, Zipp Storm, Pipp Petals, Hitch Trailblazer, Izzy Moonbow, Glory, Opaline, Misty Brightdawn

## Why download this pack?

If you're a fan of MLP G5 and want to bring your favorite characters into the world of Minecraft, this pack is made just for you!


**Enjoy!**
